message:
🐛 Fix edit link to use current version branch (#735)

* fix: edit link uses current version branch for all projects

Previously the edit pencil always linked to main branch. Now it detects
the current branch from the hostname and uses that for version branches.

- KubeStellar: always links to docs repo with current branch
- Other projects on version branches: links to docs repo version branch
- Other projects on main: links to their source repos

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* refactor: use dotAll flag for regex patterns

Address Copilot review comments from PR 727:
- Replace [\s\S]*? with .*? and use 's' (dotAll) flag
- Remove unnecessary empty string flags parameter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* refactor: address Copilot review comments

- Add VersionEntry type alias for better type clarity
- Extract branchToSlug helper function for maintainability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
